data.description: Reports in Venezuela: ‘Acting President Delcy Rodríguez receives the Jordanian Foreign Minister, Ayman Hussein Al-Safadi, this Friday at Miraflores. During this meeting, Venezuela and Jordan reaffirm their bilateral relations, which are strengthened through mutual recognition.

data.title: iPower reports Q2 2026 results: revenue $7.1M, gross profit $3.1M, operating expenses down 28% YoY to $5.6M, net loss $1.2M.
data.description: In Rancho Cucamonga, California, on February 20, 2026, iPower Inc. (Nasdaq: IPW) disclosed their financial performance for the fiscal second quarter ending December 31, 2025. The company experienced a revenue of $7.1 million during this period, which was influenced by strategic supply chain adjustments towards more U.S.-based sourcing. The gross profit recorded was $3.1 million, with a robust gross margin of 44.0%. Operating expenses saw a significant decline of 28% year-over-year, amounting to $5.6 million in comparison to the same quarter in 2024. iPower incurred a net loss of $1.2 million, translating to $(1.08) per share. The company's financial position indicated $2.0 million in cash and cash equivalents, $2.2 million in restricted cash, and approximately $2.2 million in digital assets.

data.title: Ultragenyx Pharmaceuticals grants 22,917 restricted stock units to 6 new hires as an inducement under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in rare disease therapies, announced on Feb. 20, 2026, the issuance of 22,917 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to six newly recruited non-executive officers. The awards were given as part of the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan and were approved by the compensation committee of the board of directors. This inducement was deemed essential for the new employees joining Ultragenyx, in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The grant date for these stock units was Feb. 16, 2026.

data.title: Parex Resources nominates six directors to GeoPark's Board. Parex has an 11.8% ownership in GeoPark.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on February 20, 2026, Parex Resources Inc. ("Parex" or the "Company") disclosed its 11.8% ownership stake in GeoPark Limited ("GeoPark") (NYSE: GPRK). The company put forth six well-qualified director nominees for election to GeoPark's Board of Directors at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. All nominees are considered independent of both GeoPark and Parex as per relevant securities laws and stock exchange regulations.

data.title: Xanadu Quantum Technologies Inc. will host Analyst Day on March 4, 2026 at 9:00 am ET in Toronto.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Xanadu Quantum Technologies Inc., a prominent player in photonic quantum computing, disclosed plans to hold an Analyst Day event on March 4, 2026. The event is scheduled to commence at 9:00 am Eastern Time.

data.title: Materion Corp. to hold annual shareholder’s meeting on May 7, 2026 at 8 a.m. MT in Salt Lake City, Utah. Leader in advanced materials for various industries.
data.description: MAYFIELD HEIGHTS, Ohio-- Materion Corporation (NYSE: MTRN) has scheduled its annual shareholder's meeting (the Annual Meeting) for May 7, 2026, at 8 a.m. MT at the Asher Adams, Autograph Collection, hotel located at 2400 W, Salt Lake City, Utah. Materion is a leading company in advanced materials solutions for key industries such as semiconductor, industrial, aerospace & defense, energy, and automotive. With almost a century of experience in specialized materials, Materion caters to high-performance sectors globally.

data.title: Host Hotels & Resorts sells Four Seasons Resort Orlando and Jackson Hole, along with St. Regis Houston.
data.description: The sale of the St. Regis Houston has been successfully finalized as announced earlier. This transaction marks the change in ownership of the renowned hotel. The deal involves a significant amount of financial consideration, with the exact figures undisclosed. The completion of this sale indicates a strategic move in the hospitality industry and will likely have an impact on the local market. The St. Regis Houston is now under new ownership, signaling a new chapter for the upscale establishment.

data.title: Starfighters Space surges with 75% rise, gains GE Aerospace partnership for launch program.
data.description: Starfighters Space has announced a collaboration with GE Aerospace for the next stage of its launch program evaluation. The partnership has led to a surge in shares by 75% over the course of this week. This recent development positions Starfighters Space as a notable player in the aerospace industry, garnering support from industry giant GE Aerospace.

data.title: Helix (NYSE: HLX) to join upcoming events: Daniel Energy Partners THRIVE Energy Conference, Raymond James' 47th Annual Institutional Investor Conference, Piper Sandler's 26th Annual Energy Conference.
data.description: Houston-based company Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. (NYSE: HLX) revealed its plans to partake in several upcoming events including the Daniel Energy Partners THRIVE Energy Conference in Houston, Texas on February 25, 2026, the Raymond James & Associates 47th Annual Institutional Investor Conference in Orlando, Florida on March 3, 2026, and the Piper Sandler 26th Annual Energy Conference in Las Vegas, Nevada. These events will provide the company with valuable opportunities to network and engage with industry professionals.

data.title: Electra Battery Materials Corp upsizes At-The-Market Offering to $25 million through H.C. Wainwright & Co., LLC.
data.description: Electra Battery Materials Corporation has increased its At the Market Offering Program, allowing for the potential sale of common shares totaling up to US$25 million. The initiative, facilitated through H.C. Wainwright & Co., LLC, includes the offering of Common Shares at the Company's discretion. This move expands on a previous agreement dated June 26, 2025, establishing the terms for the ATM. The US$25 million includes sales made under the Company's prospectus supplement from December 11, 2025, which totaled US$5.5 million. This development marks a significant step for Electra in capitalizing on market opportunities.

data.title: Abony Acquisition Corp. I closes $230M IPO with 23M units offered at $10/unit, including underwriter's full option.
data.description: Abony Acquisition Corp. I (AACOU) completed its initial public offering in Austin, Texas on February 20, 2026. The offering included 23,000,000 units, with an additional 3,000,000 units exercised by the underwriter’s over-allotment option in full. The public offering price was set at $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-third of one redeemable warrant. The whole warrant can be exercised to acquire one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share, with specific adjustments applicable.

data.title: CoreWeave stock falls as Blue Owl Capital fails to secure debt financing, raising doubts on project.
data.description: CoreWeave's shares dropped following reports that Blue Owl Capital, their data center partner, had not been able to secure debt financing for a project. This caused concern among investors, resulting in a decline in CoreWeave's stock value. The lack of financing from Blue Owl highlights a potential setback for the data center project. The impact of this development has been reflected in the recent stock performance of CoreWeave, which has experienced a notable decrease in its market value.

data.title: Box to present at Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 4, 2026, at 2:35pm PT in San Francisco. Webcast available at boxinvestorrelations.com.
data.description: Box, a prominent Intelligent Content Management platform listed on NYSE as BOX, shared that its management team is scheduled to speak at the upcoming Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 4, 2026, at 2:35 pm PT in San Francisco, CA. The event will be live-streamed on boxinvestorrelations.com, with a replay accessible about twelve hours post the live broadcast.

data.title: Nakamoto Inc. acquires BTC Inc and UTXO Management, leading Bitcoin media/events provider and investment firm. NASDAQ: NAKA.
data.description: Nakamoto Inc. (NASDAQ: NAKA) based in Nashville, Tennessee, has finalized the acquisition of BTC Inc and UTXO Management GP, LLC. This acquisition marks the successful completion of the deal after meeting all closing requirements. BTC Inc is a prominent provider of Bitcoin-related media and events, while UTXO specializes in investments in private and public Bitcoin companies. The acquisition is expected to strengthen Nakamoto's presence in the Bitcoin industry and capitalize on the growing market opportunities. This strategic move comes as Nakamoto aims to expand its portfolio and leverage the expertise of BTC Inc and UTXO.

data.title: Stocks rise as Nasdaq charges higher after Supreme Court rules against Trump's global tariffs. Gold prices also increase.
data.description: Stocks rose on Friday following the Supreme Court's decision against President Trump's global tariffs. The Nasdaq showed significant gains as Trump declared the global tariff. Gold prices also saw an increase.
